title: Portrait of Madame Yuki
writer: Seiichi Funabashi, Kazuo Funahashi, Yoshikata Yoda
actors: Michiyo Kogure, Yoshiko Kuga, Ken Uehara
plot: Young servant girl Hamako has just started working for her personal heroine, Madame Yuki, but her romanticized view of the Madame is broken immediately as she is introduced to a list of the Madame's personal problems.
